criteria.detail: Wired: NSMicrophoneUsageDescription in src-tauri/Info.plist + wry 0.55.1 grants requestMediaCapturePermissionForOrigin. Empirical confirmation needs the bundled app on device.
Requires a real mic + speaker loop to measure >=25 dB (human/device follow-up).
Requires speaking a word over the TTS on a real device + STT (human/device follow-up).

_note: AFK headless spike verdict. No empirical hardware PASS asserted (reality constraint): a headless agent cannot measure >=25 dB on a real mic. All criteria pending -> AFK auto-fallback selects `rust`. Re-run the on-device harness (openEchoCancelledMic + measureEchoAttenuationDb in src/audio/aec/micCapture.ts), feed criteria into buildSpikeVerdict, and persist via the Rust `aec_spike_write_verdict` command. The canonical in-app read for issue 0099 is getCaptureDecision() in src/audio/aec/captureDecision.ts.
